---
title: "Avinash Reddy Yakkanti"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.png
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:yakkantiavinash6@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/avinashreddy11105
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Full Stack Engineer · Dublin, Ireland

3 years building production-grade web applications for enterprise and government clients using React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Django, and FastAPI.

[View About →](about.qmd)

:::
